en: Does your company have a written policy regarding the management, control and screening for drugs, alcohol & intoxicants in the workplace?
Are all workers engaged by the company subject to post accident / incident drug & alcohol screening?
Are all workers engaged by the company subject to Probable / For Cause drug, alcohol & intoxicant screening?
Are all workers engaged by the company subject to random drug, alcohol & intoxicant screening?
Are all workers engaged by the company subject to drug, alcohol & intoxicant screening as part of a return to work program post incident/accident?
Examples of Training Topics: Recognizing signs of intoxication, understanding how to initiate testing for workers, etc.
Does your company provide training to people that manage workers, addressing drugs, alcohol and intoxicant awareness in the workplace?
Avetta PQF - Drug (Prescribed / Over-the-Counter & Illegal), Alcohol & Intoxicants Program
If Yes, please upload a copy of the policy:
If Yes, what percentage of workers are tested on a random basis?
Are subcontractors engaged to work on behalf of your company subject to the same rules and screening program regarding drugs, alcohol and intoxicants?
Does your company use the services of an independent third party to conduct the screening program?
Does your company conduct any form of in-house screening of workers?
If Yes, what type of in-house screening does your company conduct?
If a worker discloses they have an issue with drugs and/or alcohol, does your company have the facility to offer professional help, counseling or rehabilitation services for that worker?
Does your company have a policy in place to terminate a worker if they refuse screening?
